details.test: Task 1: Cheapest Friday DJ ticket under $35 with mobile delivery
Task 2: VIP table for 4 on next Saturday under $400 including vodka
Task 3: Guest list signup for hip-hop event this weekend (3 guests, 2F/1M, before 11 PM)
Task 4: Longer live band event with 2 tickets priced <= $50
Task 5: Featured event - choose cheaper of Early Bird vs GA for 3 tickets under $60 with e-ticket
Task 6: RSVP Interested for Halloween costume contest on Oct 31 with SMS-only
Task 7: 2 tickets for Friday EDM and Saturday Latin under $200 budget
Task 8: Register for free pre-party workshop (7 PM hour) and opt out of newsletter
Task 9: Newsletter subscription with DJ Nights + Live Bands, weekly
